items.title: OS tab exists and is super-admin gated
items.precondition: Logged into /admin as a SUPER_ADMIN_EMAILS user on dev
steps: 1. Open /admin — top bar shows Process · Projects · Support · OS
2. Click OS — full-width warm-paper surface loads with Library/Chat sub-tabs
3. Call GET /api/admin/os/ping with a non-super-admin JWT
items.expected: Tab renders; sub-tabs navigate; non-super-admin gets 403; unauthenticated gets 401
items.notes: Automated proof exists (BE/FE tsc, check:conventions --strict, 313 hermetic + 26 live-pgvector integration + 53 FE tests, FE build all green on worktree dave/os-admin-port). These 12 items are the one-time behavioural walkthrough the OWNER runs against the running app after dev merge — left pending by design.

items.title: Document lifecycle: create → edit → autosave → publish → history → restore
steps: 1. Library → New document → title it → editor opens
2. Type content incl. a heading + table + checklist; watch 'Saved · HH:MM' autosave stamp
3. Publish with a note → read view shows content, TOC, version 1
4. Edit again, change text, publish → history shows v2 with diff vs v1
5. Restore v1 → new version created with v1 content
items.expected: Full loop works; markdown round-trips (table + checklist intact); versions increment; restore never destroys history
items.notes: Automated proof exists (BE/FE tsc, check:conventions --strict, 313 hermetic + 26 live-pgvector integration + 53 FE tests, FE build all green on worktree dave/os-admin-port). These 12 items are the one-time behavioural walkthrough the OWNER runs against the running app after dev merge — left pending by design.

items.title: Indexing lifecycle + status dots + reindex
items.precondition: T2 passed; worker running on dev
steps: 1. After publish, row shows amber 'processing' pulse
2. Within ~30s dot turns green 'indexed'; summary/category/tags appear
3. Verify chunks: SELECT count(*) FROM os.document_chunks WHERE document_id = <id> — > 0
items.expected: Status transitions processing → indexed; AI metadata populated; chunks embedded at 1536 dims
items.notes: Automated proof exists (BE/FE tsc, check:conventions --strict, 313 hermetic + 26 live-pgvector integration + 53 FE tests, FE build all green on worktree dave/os-admin-port). These 12 items are the one-time behavioural walkthrough the OWNER runs against the running app after dev merge — left pending by design.

items.title: Library views: list, grouped, folders, drag-move, filters, metadata edit
steps: 1. Toggle List ⇄ Grouped ⇄ Folders views
2. Drag a doc into a folder; drag a doc between category groups
3. Edit a category pill + tags + reassign owner from the read header
4. Filter by category, owner, status; sort by updated
items.expected: All three views render; drags persist; human metadata edits survive a reindex (meta_locked)
items.notes: Automated proof exists (BE/FE tsc, check:conventions --strict, 313 hermetic + 26 live-pgvector integration + 53 FE tests, FE build all green on worktree dave/os-admin-port). These 12 items are the one-time behavioural walkthrough the OWNER runs against the running app after dev merge — left pending by design.

items.title: Search: ⌘K palette with lexical + semantic results
steps: 1. Press ⌘K inside the OS tab — palette opens
2. Type an exact title word — doc appears in results
3. Type a paraphrase of content (not literal words) — semantic section surfaces the right doc
4. Press ⌘K on /admin/mission-control — OS palette does NOT open
items.expected: Both search modes return the target doc with snippets; Enter navigates; palette scoped to OS routes
items.notes: Automated proof exists (BE/FE tsc, check:conventions --strict, 313 hermetic + 26 live-pgvector integration + 53 FE tests, FE build all green on worktree dave/os-admin-port). These 12 items are the one-time behavioural walkthrough the OWNER runs against the running app after dev merge — left pending by design.

items.title: Related documents: suggestions + accept/reject + manual add
steps: 1. Open a doc — Related rail shows AI-suggested links
2. Accept one, reject one; refresh — states persist
3. Manually add a related doc via the picker
items.expected: Suggestions appear post-index; accept/reject lifecycle sticks; manual links show as accepted
items.notes: Automated proof exists (BE/FE tsc, check:conventions --strict, 313 hermetic + 26 live-pgvector integration + 53 FE tests, FE build all green on worktree dave/os-admin-port). These 12 items are the one-time behavioural walkthrough the OWNER runs against the running app after dev merge — left pending by design.

items.title: Chat: grounded streaming answer with clickable citations
items.precondition: T3 passed; GEMINI_API_KEY live on dev
steps: 1. Chat sub-tab → New chat → ask a question answered by an indexed doc
2. Observe: thinking indicator → 'Searching…' → streamed tokens → citation chips
3. Click a citation chip — navigates to that document
4. Ask something the KB cannot answer (e.g. 'what is the capital of Mongolia')
5. Reload — conversation persists with auto-generated title
items.expected: Streams live with citations built from real chunks; out-of-scope question gets an honest refusal with zero citations; history + title persist
items.notes: Automated proof exists (BE/FE tsc, check:conventions --strict, 313 hermetic + 26 live-pgvector integration + 53 FE tests, FE build all green on worktree dave/os-admin-port). These 12 items are the one-time behavioural walkthrough the OWNER runs against the running app after dev merge — left pending by design.

items.title: Chat context attach (@-mention)
steps: 1. In the chat input, type @ and pick a document
2. Context chip appears; send a question about that doc
3. Remove the chip
items.expected: Attached doc is used for grounding; chips add/remove cleanly and persist per conversation
items.notes: Automated proof exists (BE/FE tsc, check:conventions --strict, 313 hermetic + 26 live-pgvector integration + 53 FE tests, FE build all green on worktree dave/os-admin-port). These 12 items are the one-time behavioural walkthrough the OWNER runs against the running app after dev merge — left pending by design.

items.title: Trash: archive → restore → delete forever; locks banner
steps: 1. Archive a doc — it leaves Library, appears in Trash (muted)
2. Restore it — returns with prior content and reindexes
3. Archive again → Delete forever (confirm) — gone; chunks purged
4. Open the same doc's editor in two browser tabs — second tab shows the lock banner read-only
items.expected: Trash lifecycle exact; purge removes chunks (SQL count = 0); concurrent edit blocked with a visible banner
items.notes: Automated proof exists (BE/FE tsc, check:conventions --strict, 313 hermetic + 26 live-pgvector integration + 53 FE tests, FE build all green on worktree dave/os-admin-port). These 12 items are the one-time behavioural walkthrough the OWNER runs against the running app after dev merge — left pending by design.

items.title: Imports: batch docx/xlsx/pdf/md → converted + indexed docs
items.precondition: P6 executed; sample files at hand
steps: 1. Library → Import → drop one .docx, one .xlsx, one .pdf, one .md (single batch, category assigned)
2. Watch per-file status: pending → converted; open each resulting doc
3. Import a text-poor scanned PDF — expect a visible warning on the import row
items.expected: All four convert to readable markdown docs (images preserved for docx), get the batch category, and index; warnings surface instead of silent failure
items.notes: Automated proof exists (BE/FE tsc, check:conventions --strict, 313 hermetic + 26 live-pgvector integration + 53 FE tests, FE build all green on worktree dave/os-admin-port). These 12 items are the one-time behavioural walkthrough the OWNER runs against the running app after dev merge — left pending by design.

items.title: Comments: threaded, editable, tombstoned — and no task UI anywhere
steps: 1. Comment on a doc from the read rail; reply to it
2. Edit your comment; delete the reply — 'Comment deleted' tombstone keeps the thread
3. Scan the entire OS tab for any task/assignee/due-date control
items.expected: Thread works with markdown; tombstone renders; zero task affordances exist (pmtool owns tasks)
items.notes: Automated proof exists (BE/FE tsc, check:conventions --strict, 313 hermetic + 26 live-pgvector integration + 53 FE tests, FE build all green on worktree dave/os-admin-port). These 12 items are the one-time behavioural walkthrough the OWNER runs against the running app after dev merge — left pending by design.

items.title: Design parity with Alloro app light mode + no admin regressions
steps: 1. Eyeball the OS tab against the client dashboard: warm paper #FAF8F3, Spectral doc titles, Jakarta chrome, mono meta, terracotta accents only on action/active
2. Confirm hairline-divided rows (no card-grid slop), skeleton loading, designed empty states
3. Click through Process / Projects / Support tabs and the client dashboard — unchanged
items.expected: OS reads as the same product family as the app's light mode; existing admin surfaces behave exactly as before
items.notes: Automated proof exists (BE/FE tsc, check:conventions --strict, 313 hermetic + 26 live-pgvector integration + 53 FE tests, FE build all green on worktree dave/os-admin-port). These 12 items are the one-time behavioural walkthrough the OWNER runs against the running app after dev merge — left pending by design.
